instagram.title: instagram!
content: join me on my wellness journey, as i explore 3 central pillars in my own life: fitness, nutrition, and wellbeing! this account explores the latest in the health and wellness space, drawing inspiration from evidence-based podcasts, books, publications, Tik Toks, and more! i post varied types of content including my blogs posts, media spotlights, anatomy deep dives, and daily affirmations and i cover topics ranging from: the power of building routine to meal prep inspo and from the neurobiology of discipline to healing from trauma!
it would mean the world for you to join the community i want to build through this platform :)

blog.title: live blog
content: join me on my wellness journey, as i explore 3 central pillars in my own life: fitness, nutrition, and wellbeing! this written blog explores the latest in the health and wellness space, drawing inspiration from evidence-based podcasts, books, publications, Tik Toks, and more!

through these weekly blog posts, i hope to formalise some of the insight and mindset shifts i adopted, in terms of: my weightlifting journey (fundamental principles) but also more existential, life things! i explore the value of setting S.M.A.R.T. goals, creating boundaries, fostering awe for life, remaining resilient, finding chosen family, and discovering purpose! we all learn so much every day, seeing the world in different lights, and i want to document that dynamic path of discovery, forging self-identity, and practicing radical self-love!
